markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Otto and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, keyword research, and blog development progress.](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX created a content calendar with 72 topic ideas in Airtable, targeting key clusters and keywords](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Goal: Publish 5 blog posts/week, starting with 1 for calibration, then 3, ramping up to 5](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Otto to review and approve topics in Airtable; GrowthX to update statuses](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Otto developing website/blog; GrowthX provided design recommendations and best practices](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Keyword Research

  - [Dual approach: audience pain points/interests + competitor keyword gap analysis](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [72 assignments grouped into topic clusters, balancing high-volume and high-intent keywords](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Example: "virtual travel" (110 searches/mo) vs. "AI travel assistance" (30 searches/mo, high intent)](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=359.0)
  - [SEMrush used for competitor analysis, focusing on blog content to avoid product keywords](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)

### Content Calendar and Workflow

  - [Airtable setup with client views: Considering, Approved, In Production, Ready for Review, Published](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Otto to review/approve topics via comments (can use emojis or provide additional context)](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [GrowthX updates statuses and manages content pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Aim for 3-4 weeks of content planned ahead](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)

### Blog Development and Best Practices

  - [Otto developing test homepage, planning blog page and single post template](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [GrowthX shared examples (WebStacks, SEMrush) for effective blog layouts](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
  - [Recommendations: featured articles, CTAs, simple layout, dark font on light background, sharing buttons](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Include table of contents (left/right side) to improve user engagement and reduce bounce rate](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - [Incorporate call-out sections, tables, and mid-content CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)

### Performance Tracking

  - [Looker dashboard in development, combining Google Search Console and GA4 data](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [7-8 page report breaking down organic traffic, GrowthX blog performance, and LLM referral traffic](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Complements Scrunch report for AI visibility insights](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Otto: Review and approve 10-20 topics in Airtable content calendar](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Otto: Continue website and blog template development, incorporating shared best practices](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
  - [GrowthX: Select one approved topic for calibration blog post](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [GrowthX: Share featured image examples when ready](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
  - [GrowthX: Finalize Looker dashboard setup](https://fathom.video/share/pe9sRCx4Xn2B3evjG3u7jHy3RWDmz_GJ?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - Both: Prepare for next week's meeting to discuss progress and next phase of content production
